title: verbascum blattaria
intro: Verbascum blattaria, commonly known as the moly moth mullein, is a biennial or perennial plant belonging to the figwort family. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine due to their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum blattaria include soothing throat irritations, reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
